name: Dead Men's Legs (Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Beat the egg lightly and gradually add sugar, beating with a mixer until light and foamy (about 20 minutes).
3. Add the almonds and flour; mix well.
4. Roll the dough into finger-thick ropes on a very light floured surface.
5. Flatten slightly with fingertips and cut into 3-inch lengths.
6. Place the pieces on ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake in the oven until lightly browned (about 10 minutes).
8. Remove from the cookie sheets and allow to cool completely before storing in airtight containers.
9. Makes 2 dozen cookies.
